title: Quantum Lab
description: From-scratch quantum lab in TypeScript with FOUR simulation engines: state-vector, density-matrix, stabilizer-tableau (Clifford circuits to 30 qubits), and now a Matrix Product State tensor network with a from-scratch complex SVD — running arbitrary circuits on 40 qubits in O(n·χ²) memory with a controlled, error-tracked bond-dimension truncation, perfect O(n·χ²) sampling, and per-cut entanglement entropy. Plus TEBD real-time dynamics of the transverse-field Ising chain (exact bond exponentials, 2nd-order Trotter) showing the quench entanglement light-cone, matched to exact evolution. Also: Kraus noise, a complex Hermitian eigensolver, Bloch spheres, Schmidt decomposition, error-correcting codes (bit/phase-flip, 9-qubit Shor, Steane [[7,1,3]] with live syndrome decoding), phase estimation, VQE with analytic parameter-shift gradients & QAOA, randomized benchmarking, OpenQASM export, and a 47-case self-test suite cross-checking every engine against exact references.
